author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Delivered:
1. Zero-copy permute — permute_t() now returns a stride-based view in O(ndim) instead of copying O(numel) data. Works on both CPU and GPU.
2. Zero-copy transpose — transpose_2d() now uses stride swap instead of GPU PTX kernel
3. Added Tensor::stride_view() and Tensor::stride_view_operation() — general-purpose view constructors with arbitrary shape/strides/offset
4. Added Tensor::storage_offset() and Tensor::narrow() — zero-copy slicing along a dimension
5. Added narrow_t() with NarrowBackward gradient function
6. Fixed backward engine to contiguify non-contiguous gradients on ALL devices (was CPU-only)
7. Fixed bmm, mm, matmul_differentiable, batch_transpose to auto-contiguify inputs
8. All 807 core + 250 optim + 6 integration tests pass. 5 pre-existing vision failures unchanged.
